change: Added shared manage.py hint helper for brain payloads
why: Prevent pseudo-command strings in JSON next_actions.

change: Converted brain graph/search/snapshot/decision next_actions to copy-pasteable manage.py commands
why: Agents should be able to run next_actions without translating internal command IDs.

change: Resolved bare brain command aliases for explain
why: Exact aliases such as next and snap can resolve safely without fuzzy guessing.

change: Made invalid graph algorithms structured in JSON mode
why: Let graph engine emit INVALID_ARGUMENT instead of argparse text usage for JSON-intent calls.

change: Added structured JSON usage for snap without subaction
why: Avoid parser dead-end when agents generalize sibling --format json patterns to snap.
Advertised safe-first command now includes a query and succeeds.
Lock subprocess behavior and payload command hints.
